Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPMS ;DALOI/BNT - MRAR CLINICAL RECONCILIATION SERVICES ;11/20/11 15:30 ;;1.0;VA POINT OF SERVICE (KIOSKS);**19**;Oct 21, 2011;Build 64 ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DVPXUTL ; DVPDRGA Q ; RDMS(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N DFN,ICN,PATIENTI,DVPCNT S (DFN,ICN)="" N X F X="medicationStatementId" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I MEDICATI="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Parameter medicationStatementId is required.","RDMS^DVPMS") I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(MEDICATI,"RDMS^DVPMS") G QUIT I $P(MEDICATI,":",5)="",+$P(MEDICATI,":",6)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied medicationStatementId: "_MEDICATI_" has an invalid format.","RDMS^DVPMS") S ICN=$P(MEDICATI,":",5) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"RDMS^DVPMS")=0 G QUIT N RECSET S RECSET=$NA(RECSET) D GETDRGS^DVPDRGA(.RECSET,"MS","R",MEDICATI,"") I $D(RECSET("error")) M @TARGET@("error")=RECSET("error") I $D(RECSET("results")) M @TARGET@("results","medicationStatement")=RECSET("results",$O(RECSET("results",""))) QUIT ; Q ; SRCHMS(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N DFN,ICN,PATIENTI,DVPCNT,SMRY S (DFN,ICN)="",SMRY=0 D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS),CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 S ICN=$P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"SRCHMS^DVPMS")=0 G QUIT2 N RECSET S RECSET=$NA(RECSET) D GETDRGS^DVPDRGA(.RECSET,"MS","S","",SMRY) M @TARGET@("results","bundle")=RECSET("results") QUIT2 ; Q
